chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) The department shall adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter, including rules governing the application for a permit under this subchapter.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.411 — Rules

(a) The department shall adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter, including rules governing the application for a permit under this subchapter.

(b) The Department of Public Safety shall adopt rules requiring additional safety and driver training for permits issued under this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 3, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter, including rules governing the application for a permit under this subchapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The Department of Public Safety shall adopt rules requiring additional safety and driver training for permits issued under this subchapter.
